text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's early morning on the big day when Seiun Sky
is set to start seriously training for the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Here we go... Oh, would you look at that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The wind's calm, the waves are gentle... This is the
perfect weather for fishing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead, cast your line. You can prop your
fishing rod up on the cooler there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Then all that's left is to relax a bit, snooze a little,
and sit tight till you get a nibble. Easy, right?
choice_data_list: I thought we were going to train!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But I had today down as "Fishing Day ☆" on
my calendar.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm just kidding. I know what day it is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's the day we get serious! Yep, the most crucial
of crucial turning points.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, I'm gonna make an absolutely no-nonsense suggestion right here and now. That is why we have to go fishing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I wanna set the mood by catching a big one! ☆ If we don't flounder here, these next three years will be breaming with joy!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're just gonna let that one hang?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! We'll totally, probably catch
something. Then we can start training after that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is pretty fickle. She's probably just
using that mood maker stuff as an excuse to get
out of training. But still...
choice_data_list:
We're heading right back to the academy once
we catch something.

We're heading right back to the academy once
we catch something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh? So you're confident that we'll land a lunker?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's gonna happen next? Stay tuned after this
commercial break! Or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sky says this jokingly, but thirty minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh... I think I got a bite. ♪ Get the net ready!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, come on—the net! I'm reeling it iiin...
Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at this beaut! It's a sixteen-inch flounder!
That's a whopper and no fooling! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Boooy, I can't believe it. Never thought I'd pull in
one this big.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And so! I hereby present this flounder to you,
Trainer. Don't be shy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, just my way of showing my honest
appreciation for coming out with me so early in
the morning.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Plus... we're gonna get an even bigger catch if we
keep at it together, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I wanna catch at least three fish. One
in April, one in May, and theeen one in October.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho—the dates all line up with the Classic
Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Okay! We have to get to work while the fish is
still fresh.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've got a cutting board, a knife, and a whole set
of seasonings right here! I even brought a pot to
cook with!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All that's left is for you to clean the fish. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Who else? You're not gonna let a dainty Horsegirl like
me wave a kitchen knife around, are ya?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I need a break anyway. It was kind of a pain
searching around for fishing sp—oops.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh... I wasn't supposed to say that part out loud.
choice_data_list: You really went all out planning this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Fishing has its charms even if you don't catch
anything, but since you were gonna be joining
me, I really wanted to snag something good.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I did some research, read the tides, and came up
with a plan. If that's what it takes to win, then
that's what I'm gonna do, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah. I wish my races went this smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... That's enough chitchat, I'd say. I'll see ya
when I wake up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wake me when the food's done, preferably by
holding a spoonful of broth under my nose. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks in advance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Seiun Sky, an ever-drifting cloud that no
one can manage to grasp. Our journey to reel in
the "big catch" has finally begun!
